floor_1.text: The tower base. Damp air thick with the scent of slime. Your first step begins.

floor_10.text: The chamber trembles. A colossal slime throne blocks your ascent.

floor_11.text: Walls begin to crystallize. You hear cracking from deep within the stone.

floor_20.text: A crystal heart pulses in the hall's center. Its light is blinding.

floor_21.text: Temperature plummets. Spirit whispers seep from wall cracks.

floor_30.text: Thick darkness envelops you. Something stalks you from the void.

floor_31.text: Scorching heat. Lava streams flow between the tower floors.

floor_40.text: A dragon's roar shakes the tower. Embers dance in the air.

floor_41.text: Frost begins to form. Your breath turns to ice.

floor_50.text: Absolute cold. Time itself halts before the Frozen Warden.

floor_51.text: You pierce the clouds. A starry sky unfolds inside the tower.

floor_60.text: Living constellations shift across the walls. They watch you.

floor_70.text: Gravity weakens. Planet fragments drift around you.

floor_75.text: The void opens. Something devours starlight ahead.

floor_76.text: A divine aura presses close. You near the peak of existence.

floor_90.text: Reality begins to crack. Voices from beyond dimensions call your name.

floor_100.text: The Tower's Summit. The singularity of all stars. Nova Prime awaits.
